title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/11/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 2.64% today, the main contract closed 680. The traders' willingness to ship is general .The steel mills are purchase on demand. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
